name: Does voice search matter more for lawyers in big cities like Los Angeles or Austin?
description: Yes. Local voice searches are often tied to city-specific intent, so accurate location signals matter even more in large metro areas.

mainEntity.name: Does voice search matter more for lawyers in big cities like Los Angeles or Austin?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you serve a specific metro area, your city and service-area signals matter a lot because voice searches are often local. That means location pages, accurate contact info, and a strong Google Business Profile are especially important in places like Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, and Salt Lake City.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Local voice searches are often tied to city-specific intent, so accurate location signals matter even more in large metro areas.
